Text:
One single continuous photograph — no panels, grids, or split frames.

Use the uploaded photo as the exact base composition. The street in the source
is empty — populate it with the people and vehicles specified below. Remove all
modern businesses, logos, brands, storefront names, banners, advertisements, and
signage visible in the source image.

PRESERVE (must match source exactly)
- camera: eye-level, facing park, fov 90
- residential road, 1-lane, concrete
- sidewalks absent, curbs absent
- driveways: center; parking: lot
- commercial building at left, 1 story, stucco, brick, glass, metal, flat roof, shallow setback
- commercial building at center, 1 story, concrete, brick, glass, flat roof, shallow setback
- utilities: street lamp, power lines, fire hydrant
- landscape: grass strip, planter, hedge, flower bed
Keep this location instantly recognizable.

OUTPUT FORMAT
Create a TRUE 9:16 vertical portrait image — one single frame. Expand the SAME
scene naturally above (sky) and below (street/pavement) — this is canvas
extension of one photograph, not additional panels. Do not stretch or distort
the source geometry.

TRANSFORM TO 2015
Smartphone era fully arrived. A 2015 station — LED-lit canopy, digital price sign, video ads playing on every pump screen, and a big convenience store.

PERIOD DETAILS
- ice merchandiser by the door
- pumps with color screens playing ads
- price sign showing gas around $2.45
- main sign: an independent station sign in the style of Shell
- window signs: '2 ENERGY DRINKS $5', 'E-CIG STARTER KITS'
- a red DVD-rental kiosk by the store entrance
- a chalkboard A-frame sign advertising the coffee bar
Typography: minimalist flat sans-serif, simplified modern logos.
Sign text is only what appears in quotes — do not turn other words from this prompt into signage.

PEOPLE
EXACTLY 5 people, spread out with empty areas.
- a driver vacuuming his car at the vacuum island
- a customer watching the pump screen ads while fueling
- a young couple pushing a jogging stroller
Clothing: men in beards, skinny jeans; women in infinity scarves, ankle boots. Fashion palette: coral, mint green, navy. No posing or eye contact. All people on sidewalks, at storefronts, or beside parked vehicles — the driving lanes stay empty of pedestrians.

VEHICLES
EXACTLY 4 period vehicles, all different:
- 2011-2017 Honda Odyssey — lightning-bolt beltline minivan — black
- 2013-2016 Mazda CX-5 — flowing KODO-design crossover — pearl white
- 2012-2017 Toyota Camry — sharper creased mid-size sedan — gray
- 2011-2016 Volkswagen Jetta — clean simple sedan — white
Parked with gaps; no vehicle newer than 2015.
PLACEMENT: the first two parked on the LEFT side; the last one driving away from the camera. No vehicle in the same spot as any other era.

ENVIRONMENT
- road markings: yellow center line, white edge lines, high-visibility crosswalks
- utilities: overhead power lines common, undergrounding in new developments, fiber optic lines on poles

TREES
- deciduous tree at left: established tree, modest canopy
- deciduous tree at background: established tree, modest canopy
- conifer tree at right: mature tree, full canopy
Tree sizes MUST follow this specification even where they differ from the source photo.

PHOTOGRAPHIC STYLE
COLOR photograph — digital — DSLR or smartphone camera look.
Color: high saturation. Grain: clean, minimal noise.
Photorealistic — NOT black-and-white, no HDR.

PRIVACY
Blur all faces and license plates.
SelectedVehicles: 2012-2017 Toyota Camry — sharper creased mid-size sedan
